phrases.text_local: Comment aller au centre en métro ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON ah-LAY oh sontr on may-TROH
phrases.cultural_note: Metro M1 connects the station to Ouchy and the Flon. It's part of the m1 network — a unique rack railway system.

responses.english: Take the M2 toward Ouchy-Olympique. The center is two stops.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY luh em DUH dee-rek-SYON oo-SHEE oh-lam-PEEK. luh SAHN-truh eh ah duz ah-REH
responses.french: Prenez le M2 direction Ouchy-Olympique. Le centre est à deux arrêts.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about trains to Geneva Airport
phrases.text_local: Comment aller à l'aéroport de Genève ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON ah-LAY ah lah-ay-roh-POR duh zheh-NEV
phrases.cultural_note: to Geneva Airport (Gare) take about 50 minutes. Trains run every 15 minutes.

responses.english: The train departs from around platform 5. Check the departure screen.
responses.phonetic: luh TRAHN par doo KAY SANK ahn-vee-ROHN. vay-ree-fee-AY lay-KRAHN day day-PAR
responses.french: Le train part du quai cinq environ. Vérifiez l'écran des départs.

phrases.cultural_note: The GoldenPass scenic train to Montreux and the Riviera (Vevey, Montreux) departs from Lausanne. The route is spectacular.

responses.english: Regional train, twenty minutes. Check the platform on the screen.
responses.phonetic: trahn ray-zhoh-NAL, vant mee-NOOT. vay-ree-fee-AY luh KAY soor lay-KRAHN
responses.french: Train régional, vingt minutes. Vérifiez le quai sur l'écran.

phrases.cultural_note: Swiss trains are world-famous for punctuality. Lausanne is a major hub — expect minimal delays and clean, efficient service.

responses.english: Yes, delays are very rare here.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay ruh-TAR son treh RAR ee-SEE
responses.french: Oui, les retards sont très rares ici.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une consigne à bagages ?
phrases.cultural_note: The station has luggage lockers (consignes automatiques). Use coins or a Swiss Half Fare Card for access.

responses.english: Yes, the lockers are near the platforms. Pay by card or coins.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay kon-SEEN-yuh son preh day KAY. pay-YAY par kart oo pyess
responses.french: Oui, les consignes sont près des quais. Payez par carte ou pièces.
